## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and RunPod to discuss ongoing projects and client updates.](https://fathom.video/share/RyhJZbsmjxFNPrJzd6GAsWxLNC7P8rVD?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [RunPod contract canceled; GrowthX to operate on good faith for remaining 30 days](https://fathom.video/share/RyhJZbsmjxFNPrJzd6GAsWxLNC7P8rVD?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Webflow project progressing: integration pages and developer publication in focus](https://fathom.video/share/RyhJZbsmjxFNPrJzd6GAsWxLNC7P8rVD?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Abnormal content production on track: 20 articles/week (10 new, 10 glossary refreshes)](https://fathom.video/share/RyhJZbsmjxFNPrJzd6GAsWxLNC7P8rVD?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Team to conduct a retrospective on RunPod project to improve future strategies](https://fathom.video/share/RyhJZbsmjxFNPrJzd6GAsWxLNC7P8rVD?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
